_patch_meta.supersedes: PATCH-20260406-DIMGRPDESC-VCB029-ALL-V1 (incorrect group_code keys — used strongs-based codes instead of mti-based codes)
_patch_meta.description: Repair patch v2 — VCB-029 Registries 206, 207, 208, 209, 212: replace 45 placeholder context_descriptions. Group codes are mti_term_id-serial as per programme convention. Mapping verified against anchor verse references in original patch. Source: wa-vcb-029-term-observations-v1.1-20260406.md. Companion: PATCH-20260406-DIMGRPDESC-211-V1 covers Reg 211. Both must be applied before regenerating cluster extracts.

set.context_description: Term describes the pouring out of the innermost self — the soul poured to death, the Spirit poured upon the people — the act of ultimate inner giving
set.notes: REPAIR-20260406: placeholder replaced from wa-vcb-029-term-observations-v1.1. Anchor: Isa 53:12

operations.description: 1368-001 (a.rah H6168, Reg 206 group A): correct context_description from observations file

set.context_description: Term describes the divine act of uncovering and exposing the person in judgment, bringing shame and humiliation
set.notes: REPAIR-20260406: placeholder replaced from wa-vcb-029-term-observations-v1.1. Anchor: Isa 3:17

operations.description: 1368-002 (a.rah H6168, Reg 206 group B): correct context_description from observations file

set.context_description: Term names the violation of intimate covering — the uncovering of sexual boundaries that carries moral consequence and iniquity
set.notes: REPAIR-20260406: placeholder replaced from wa-vcb-029-term-observations-v1.1. Anchor: Lev 20:18

operations.description: 1368-003 (a.rah H6168, Reg 206 group C): correct context_description from observations file

set.context_description: Term expresses the person's inner vulnerability and the prayer not to be left defenseless before God
set.notes: REPAIR-20260406: placeholder replaced from wa-vcb-029-term-observations-v1.1. Anchor: Psa 141:8

operations.description: 1368-004 (a.rah H6168, Reg 206 group D): correct context_description from observations file

set.context_description: Term names the intimate dignity of the person — the nakedness that the law protects from sexual violation and that defines moral and relational boundaries
set.notes: REPAIR-20260406: placeholder replaced from wa-vcb-029-term-observations-v1.1. Anchor: Lev 18:6

operations.description: 7407-001 (er.vah H6172, Reg 206 group A): correct context_description from observations file

set.context_description: Term names nakedness as the person's vulnerability that God covers in covenantal love — the act of covering as the foundation of belonging
set.notes: REPAIR-20260406: placeholder replaced from wa-vcb-029-term-observations-v1.1. Anchor: Eze 16:8

operations.description: 7407-002 (er.vah H6172, Reg 206 group B): correct context_description from observations file

set.context_description: Term names nakedness as the shame and exposure that follows spiritual unfaithfulness — judgment as uncovering
set.notes: REPAIR-20260406: placeholder replaced from wa-vcb-029-term-observations-v1.1. Anchor: Isa 47:3

operations.description: 7407-003 (er.vah H6172, Reg 206 group C): correct context_description from observations file

set.context_description: Term names the covering required for dignity in the divine presence — nakedness that must not be exposed before the holy God
set.notes: REPAIR-20260406: placeholder replaced from wa-vcb-029-term-observations-v1.1. Anchor: Exo 20:26

operations.description: 7407-004 (er.vah H6172, Reg 206 group D): correct context_description from observations file

set.context_description: Term names the pre-fall state of nakedness without shame — the person's original inner freedom from guilt and fear before God and the other
set.notes: REPAIR-20260406: placeholder replaced from wa-vcb-029-term-observations-v1.1. Anchor: Gen 2:25

operations.description: 1369-001 (a.rom H6174, Reg 206 group A): correct context_description from observations file

set.context_description: Term expresses the radical existential nakedness of the human person — coming and returning with nothing, utterly dependent
set.notes: REPAIR-20260406: placeholder replaced from wa-vcb-029-term-observations-v1.1. Anchor: Job 1:21

operations.description: 1369-002 (a.rom H6174, Reg 206 group B): correct context_description from observations file

set.context_description: Term describes nakedness as prophetic or ecstatic expression — the person's body and inner being made a visible sign before God and others
set.notes: REPAIR-20260406: placeholder replaced from wa-vcb-029-term-observations-v1.1. Anchor: Isa 20:2

operations.description: 1369-003 (a.rom H6174, Reg 206 group C): correct context_description from observations file

set.context_description: Term names the nakedness of the vulnerable, the oppressed, and the captive — a condition that calls for inner-being response
set.notes: REPAIR-20260406: placeholder replaced from wa-vcb-029-term-observations-v1.1. Anchor: Isa 58:7

operations.description: 1369-004 (a.rom H6174, Reg 206 group D): correct context_description from observations file

set.context_description: Term names the nakedness of divine judgment — the stripping that accompanies wrath, exposing what was hidden
set.notes: REPAIR-20260406: placeholder replaced from wa-vcb-029-term-observations-v1.1. Anchor: Amo 2:16

operations.description: 1369-005 (a.rom H6174, Reg 206 group E): correct context_description from observations file

set.context_description: Term names the originary nakedness and bareness of the person — utter vulnerability before God's care intervenes
set.notes: REPAIR-20260406: placeholder replaced from wa-vcb-029-term-observations-v1.1. Anchor: Eze 16:7

operations.description: 7409-001 (er.yah H6181, Reg 206 group A): correct context_description from observations file

set.context_description: Term names nakedness as the shame and exposure that judgment brings upon spiritual unfaithfulness
set.notes: REPAIR-20260406: placeholder replaced from wa-vcb-029-term-observations-v1.1. Anchor: Mic 1:11

operations.description: 7409-002 (er.yah H6181, Reg 206 group B): correct context_description from observations file

set.context_description: Term names the razor as the instrument of divine shaming — used to strip the honour and dignity of the person in judgment

operations.description: 7408-001 (ta.ar H8593, Reg 206 group A): correct context_description from observations file

set.context_description: Term names the razor as what the consecrated person avoids — its avoidance marking the person's inner dedication to God

operations.description: 7408-002 (ta.ar H8593, Reg 206 group B): correct context_description from observations file

set.context_description: Term frames a comparison that characterises the inner disposition of deceit — the tongue like a razor, plotting destruction

operations.description: 7408-003 (ta.ar H8593, Reg 206 group C): correct context_description from observations file

set.context_description: Term names the inner darkness that fills the person when their inner orientation is corrupted — the whole inner life darkened by a bad eye
set.notes: REPAIR-20260406: placeholder replaced from wa-vcb-029-term-observations-v1.1. Anchor: Mat 6:23

operations.description: 7435-001 (skoteinos G4652, Reg 207): correct context_description from observations file

set.context_description: Term names darkness as the inner condition of spiritual alienation — the state of the person who hates, does not know where they are going, and has not come to the light
set.notes: REPAIR-20260406: placeholder replaced from wa-vcb-029-term-observations-v1.1. Anchor: 1Jo 2:11

operations.description: 7433-001 (skotia G4653, Reg 207 group A): correct context_description from observations file

set.context_description: Term names the darkness of concealment — the inner life hidden in secret, which will be brought to light

operations.description: 7433-002 (skotia G4653, Reg 207 group B): correct context_description from observations file

set.context_description: Term describes the darkening of inner capacities — understanding, heart, and eyes — as the consequence of wilful rejection of God or as divine judicial act

operations.description: 7434-001 (skotizō G4654, Reg 207): correct context_description from observations file

set.context_description: Term names darkness as the inner-spiritual domain the person inhabits, is rescued from, or identifies with — their fundamental spiritual condition and identity

operations.description: 7432-001 (skotos G4655, Reg 207 group A): correct context_description from observations file

operations.description: 7432-002 (skotos G4655, Reg 207 group B): correct context_description from observations file

set.context_description: Term names the darkness of the inner life — hidden purposes, corrupted inner light, self-deception about one's inner state

operations.description: 7432-003 (skotos G4655, Reg 207 group C): correct context_description from observations file

operations.description: 7432-004 (skotos G4655, Reg 207 group D): correct context_description from observations file

set.context_description: Term describes the plunging of the person/domain into darkness as divine judgment, producing inner anguish

operations.description: 1371-001 (skotoō G4656, Reg 207): correct context_description from observations file

set.context_description: Term names spiritual blindness as the inner condition of the person who claims to see but does not — self-deception, hardness, and inability to perceive spiritual reality

operations.description: 1372-001 (tuflos G5185, Reg 207 group A): correct context_description from observations file

operations.description: 1372-002 (tuflos G5185, Reg 207 group B): correct context_description from observations file

set.context_description: Term describes the act of blinding the inner capacities — eyes and mind — whether through hatred, spiritual adversary, or divine judicial action
set.notes: REPAIR-20260406: placeholder replaced from wa-vcb-029-term-observations-v1.1. Anchor: 2Cor 4:4

operations.description: 7438-001 (tufloō G5186, Reg 207): correct context_description from observations file

set.context_description: Term names the inner disposition of delay and hesitation — the reluctance to act that must be overcome in urgent obedience

operations.description: 7359-001 (okneō G3635, Reg 208): correct context_description from observations file

set.context_description: Term names the inner disposition of laziness and reluctance — contrasted with zealous, fervent inner engagement

operations.description: 1376-001 (oknēros G3636, Reg 208): correct context_description from observations file

set.context_description: Term names sluggishness as the inner disposition of hesitation that must be overcome in pursuing God's purpose

operations.description: 7353-001 (a.tsel H6101, Reg 208): correct context_description from observations file

set.context_description: Term names the sluggard as a person whose inner desire craves but whose will refuses to act — passivity, inertia, and self-defeating inner contradiction

operations.description: 1374-001 (a.tsel H6102, Reg 208 group A): correct context_description from observations file

operations.description: 1374-002 (a.tsel H6102, Reg 208 group B): correct context_description from observations file

set.context_description: Term names slothfulness as an inner disposition that produces stupor and material ruin — inaction consuming the person from within

operations.description: 1373-001 (ats.lah H6103, Reg 208): correct context_description from observations file

set.context_description: Term names idleness as an inner disposition that the person of virtue refuses — its absence marking inner diligence and character

operations.description: 7354-001 (ats.lut H6104, Reg 208): correct context_description from observations file

set.context_description: Term names the inner collapse of courage and resolve — feeble hands, fainting spirit, melting heart in the face of threat or judgment

operations.description: 1375-001 (ra.phah H7503, Reg 208 group A): correct context_description from observations file

set.context_description: Term expresses divine faithfulness as the refusal to forsake — the assurance that addresses the inner fear of abandonment

operations.description: 1375-002 (ra.phah H7503, Reg 208 group B): correct context_description from observations file

set.context_description: Term describes the inner act of releasing, ceasing, or becoming still — letting go of wrath, being still before God, holding or releasing what matters

operations.description: 1375-003 (ra.phah H7503, Reg 208 group C): correct context_description from observations file

set.context_description: Term names the inner disposition of slackness and procrastination — the failure to act that is morally equivalent to destruction

operations.description: 1375-004 (ra.phah H7503, Reg 208 group D): correct context_description from observations file

set.context_description: Term describes the person's conformity to the image and likeness of Christ — the inner and eschatological telos of the person's transformation

operations.description: 7360-001 (summorfos G4832, Reg 209): correct context_description from observations file

set.context_description: Term describes the person's inner conformity to Christ through suffering — the act of becoming like him in his death as an inner-being participation

operations.description: 1377-001 (summorfoomai G4833, Reg 209): correct context_description from observations file

operations.description: 2381-001 (tse.la H6739, Reg 212): correct context_description from observations file

_patch_summary.mapping_method: Each group_code verified against anchor verse in original VCB-029 patch, then matched to corresponding description in observations file by anchor reference

_post_application_instruction.step_1: Apply companion patch PATCH-20260406-DIMGRPDESC-211-V1 (Reg 211, 15 operations) if not already applied
_post_application_instruction.step_2: Sync wa_dimension_index.context_description for all 60 affected group_codes: UPDATE wa_dimension_index SET context_description = (SELECT context_description FROM verse_context_group WHERE verse_context_group.group_code = wa_dimension_index.group_code) WHERE wa_dimension_index.group_code IN (the 60 group_codes across both patches)
_post_application_instruction.step_3: Verify zero rows remain in wa_dimension_index for Registries 206, 207, 208, 209, 211, 212 with context_description LIKE 'Context group for%'
_post_application_instruction.step_4: Report update counts for both tables (verse_context_group and wa_dimension_index)
_post_application_instruction.step_5: Regenerate the dimension report and all affected cluster extracts
